productDisplayName: Be For Bag Women Pink Tote Bag
description: Style NoteWhen the whole world is going environmentally-friendly, be it with recycling, planting trees or going plastic-free, why should you be left behind? Get inspired by your favourite colours and quotes and join the race to help the environment in a stylish and trendy way. We bring you these eco friendly bags from be for bag, with fabulous prints on a cotton base. Carry your essentials with these stylish tote bags and show your concerned for the environment tooProduct DetailPink bag with white and grey slightly distressed graphic printOne main zipped compartment with organiser sleevesTwo short handles made of fabric for carrying easeBranding in white slightly distressed graphic print on the back for styleComes with a seed pouch and seeds to plant a tree and save the environmentMaterial and CareCotton CanvasRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtSizeHeight: 35 cmWidth: 52 cmDepth: 15 cm
